request_text: NFR-005 follow-up from #2531 runtime_bridge decomposition: residual runtime_bridge.py is ~70% of the original 3813 LOC vs the ~35-40% thin-orchestrator guidance. Needs a PO/scoping decision on a follow-up slice that lifts the query/answer decision-builders (~400-500 LOC, lightly monkeypatched) into a runtime_bridge_query.py seam; optional larger lever is extracting the decide_next 4-phase orchestration core. Carry the FR-012 compat-preservation vs NFR-005 reduction tension to sibling degods #2056/#2057/#2059/#2464.

evidence_ref: NFR-005 deferred for PO scoping. Cheapest lever: lift query/answer decision-builders (~400-500 LOC, lightly monkeypatched) to a runtime_bridge_query.py seam; optional larger lever: extract the decide_next 4-phase orchestration core. Residual 70.1% adjudicated acceptance-passing (advisory guidance). Documented in PR pr/runtime-bridge-degod-decomp body + issue-matrix #2531 + project memory; FR-012-vs-NFR-005 tension carried to sibling degods #2056/#2057/#2059/#2464. No code change this slice.
